design_philosophy.identity: The NetSentinel - A high-fidelity, cyberpunk monitoring dashboard. Precision, stealth, and data visibility.
core_principles: Data over decoration: Status is the hero.
Darkness is the canvas: Use deep blacks (#050505) to make neon pop.
Motion denotes life: Static is dead. Pulse, scan, and glitch to show activity.
Terminal aesthetics: Monospaced fonts for all data points.

layout.spacing: Generous padding (p-6 to p-8) inside containers, tight gaps (gap-4) between containers.
layout.container_style: Rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-[#0A0A0A] relative overflow-hidden

breakpoints.mobile: Single column stack. Status Hero -> Controls -> History -> Settings
breakpoints.desktop: Grid cols-12. Status (col-span-8), Controls (col-span-4), History (col-span-8), Settings (col-span-4)

StatusHero.style: Flex center, pulsing radial gradient background. Text uses 'Glitch' effect on change.

TerminalLog.style: Monospace font. Green text for 'Came Online', Red for 'Went Offline', Grey for timestamp. Scrollable area with custom thin scrollbar.
TerminalLog.animation: New entries slide in from left.

CyberButton.style: Sharp edges or minimal rounded (rounded-sm). Hover: Background fill with neon color, text turns black. Active: Scale down 0.98.

SettingsVault.style: Input fields look like code blocks. Background #000000. Border-bottom only (1px solid #333). Focus: Border-bottom neon blue.
SettingsVault.security: Password fields must use type='password'. Toggle visibility icon required.

visual_enhancers.scanlines: Overlay div with repeating linear gradient (transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.5)) pointer-events-none z-50 opacity-20.
visual_enhancers.grid_bg: CSS radial-gradient dots pattern #333 1px, transparent 1px. Size 20px 20px.

motion.entry_stagger: framer-motion staggered fade-in-up for list items

testing.rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs) and dynamic text (status, timestamp) must have data-testid attributes (e.g., 'status-indicator', 'start-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALLATION: Run 'npm install lucide-react sonner framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge' (or yarn add).
2. SETUP: Add JetBrains Mono to index.html or import in CSS.
3. THEME: Force 'dark' class on the root html/body. This app is dark-mode only.
4. COMPONENTS: Build 'ui/card.js', 'ui/button.js', 'ui/input.js', 'ui/badge.js' using the Cyberpunk aesthetic (no default white cards).
5. LAYOUT: Create a Dashboard layout with a Sidebar (desktop) or Bottom Nav (mobile) OR a simple Single-Page-App with Tabs.
6. NOTIFICATIONS: Use 'sonner' for in-app toasts when status changes or settings save.
7. DATA: Mock the WebSocket/Polling connection in the frontend until backend is ready. Use a context provider for 'StatusContext'.
8. CRITICAL: Ensure the 'Settings' inputs for credentials are visually distinct and feel secure (padlock icons, masked text).
9. Universal Guidelines: Follow the <UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT> provided in the prompt.
